element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Builds endurance and continuous stepping speed
Combines timing with reactive obstacle avoidance
Culminating challenge requiring precision without visual clarity

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty escalation across five challenge sequence; early challenges establish mechanics, late challenges stress-test player coordination and reaction speed

difficulty_curve.early_game: Timing-focused basics with Hurdles; low pressure introduction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Hop A Log and Animal Trail establish directional and endurance demands; moderate complexity
difficulty_curve.late_game: Rafting introduces reactive adaptation; Dark Tunnel removes visual guidance demanding pure dexterity
notable_spikes: Dark Tunnel challenge — significant difficulty spike from sensory deprivation
Animal Trail speed escalation — jump from controlled timing to sustained rhythm speed

notable_level_patterns.description: Five Olympic-style challenges arranged in ascending complexity; each challenge isolates specific physical skills (timing → hopping → running → reactivity → dexterity)
Each challenge trains a different movement pattern; progression builds layered competency rather than adding obstacles to same mechanics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Hurdles (discrete timing) vs Animal Trail (sustained rhythm)

notable_level_patterns.description: Early challenges provide clear visual feedback; Dark Tunnel removes visual reference entirely, forcing proprioceptive reliance
